Title: Map Stability - Basic Operations
Preconditions: PR #2138 deployed; Cart has products; Multiple pickup locations configured
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Pickup' radio button in delivery options
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup location modal opens with map and location list
[ACT] measure map container dimensions
[ACT] type location name in search field
[WAIT] search results update
[ASSERT] map dimensions unchanged
[ACT] click X button to clear search
[WAIT] all locations restored
[ASSERT] map dimensions unchanged
[ACT] type address in search field
[ACT] clear search manually
[ACT] repeat search/clear cycle three more times
Assertions:
[DOM] pickup modal opens without errors
[DOM] map renders with markers
[STATE] map container dimensions remain stable across all search interactions
[STATE] no visual layout jump or shift observed after each clear/search cycle
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during modal interactions
[NETWORK] no 5xx errors on search API calls
Failure_Signals: Map dimension changes during search (VCST-4518 regression); Map width drops below 40% after search; console TypeError on map interaction; Modal not responding to search input
Cleanup: Close modal; navigate away from cart

Title: Search - Debounce/Performance
Preconditions: Pickup modal open; Network tab open in DevTools
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] type rapidly in search field (5+ characters within 500ms)
[WAIT] observe API calls via browser_network_requests tool (filter by search endpoint path)
[ACT] count total XHR/fetch calls made to search endpoint during rapid typing
[ASSERT] search requests are debounced — total call count <= number of debounce intervals fired (not one call per keystroke)
[ASSERT] response time is reasonable (< 2s)
Assertions:
[STATE] search is debounced — API not called on every single keystroke
[STATE] no excessive or redundant API calls observed — call count matches debounce interval count
[STATE] response time acceptable under typical conditions
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] browser_network_requests: count XHR/fetch calls to pickup search endpoint; total count <= debounce interval count (not per keystroke)
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during rapid typing
Failure_Signals: Excessive API calls on every keystroke (call count equals keystroke count); Search hangs or times out; console errors on rapid input

Title: Map Width After No-Results Search Submit (Bug Fix)
Preconditions: PR #2138 deployed; VCST-4518 fix included; Cart has products
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup modal opens
[ACT] measure initial map container width using browser_evaluate: document.querySelector('.pickup-modal__map, [class*="map-container"], [data-testid="pickup-map"]')?.getBoundingClientRect()?.width — note baseline value and modal total width
[ACT] calculate baseline ratio: map_width / modal_width; assert >= 0.40
[ACT] type 'xyzabc123notastore' in search field (guaranteed no-results query)
[ACT] [CLICK] search/magnifier button to submit OR [PRESS] Enter key to submit the search (implementation may use either; try button click first, fall back to Enter if no button present)
[WAIT] debounced search request completes — monitor via browser_network_requests filtering by /graphql for store-search or pickup-location query
[WAIT] no-results / 'not found' empty state appears in the list panel (post-submit, not on keystroke)
[ACT] measure map container width again using browser_evaluate (same selector as baseline)
[ASSERT] map container width >= 40% of modal width (ratio check: map_width / modal_width >= 0.40)
[ACT] clear search field (click X or clear button)
[WAIT] all locations restored in list panel
[ACT] measure map container width again using browser_evaluate
[ASSERT] map container width >= 40% of modal width
[ACT] type a valid location name and submit (click search button OR press Enter)
[WAIT] results shown in list panel
[ACT] measure map container width again using browser_evaluate
[ASSERT] map container width >= 40% of modal width
[ACT] click a location to open info card
[ASSERT] info card content is readable with adequate map space
Assertions:
[MATH] map container width >= 40% of modal width at all times (verified via browser_evaluate at each stage: baseline, post-no-results-submit, post-clear, post-valid-results)
[DOM] no-results empty state appears in list panel AFTER search is submitted — not merely on keystroke
[DOM] no-results state does not cause map to collapse
[DOM] info card is readable alongside the map (map not crowded out)
[STATE] VCST-4518 regression: map width never shrinks below 40% through any search state
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during search interactions
[NETWORK] browser_network_requests: store-search /graphql query fires after submit action (button click or Enter), not on every keystroke; returns 2xx
Failure_Signals: Map width drops below 40% during or after no-results search submit (VCST-4518 regression); Map entirely hidden after no-results search; No-results state appears on keystroke without submit (may indicate search mode differs from spec); Info card overlaps map making content unreadable; browser_evaluate returns null (update selector to match live DOM); Search button absent and Enter key does not trigger search (document actual submit mechanism)

Title: Pickup Location Modal — Load-More / Pagination with 10+ Locations
Preconditions: Authenticated user; Cart with BOPIS-eligible items; 10 or more pickup locations configured in the system
Steps:

[WAIT] additional locations rendered in list

[WAIT] all locations loaded
[ASSERT] total accessible locations equals expected count (all 10+ locations visible)
